1.1: Mwa, Pol, mo finn vinn apot Zezi Kris gras ar promes Bondie nou Sover ek Zezi Kris nou lesperans,
1.2: mo pe adres twa sa let la Timote, twa mo zanfan seri dan lafwa; mo demann Bondie Papa ek Zezi Kris nou Segner akord twa so lagras, so pardon ek so lape.
1.3: Kan mo ti kit Masedwann, mo ti rekomann twa res dan Efez. Ena dimoun pe propaz enn lot lansegnman, to bizin dir zot arete.
1.4: Anpes zot rakont toutsort kalite zistwar ek koz gran-gran koze lor bann anset parski tousala pa servi nanye parski zis par lafwa ki plan Bondie avanse.
1.5: Konpran kifer mo pe donn sa lord la. Mo oule lamour dan enn leker prop, enn konsians drwat ek enn lafwa sinser.
1.6: Ena finn perdi sime e zot lespri finn egare dan bann diskour ninport.
1.7: Zot pretann ki zot bann koneser lalwa alors ki zot pa mem konpran seki zot pe dir ni seki zot pe ansegne.
1.8: Nou kone ki lalwa enn bon kiksoz, si konn bien servi li.
1.9: Lalwa pa konsern bann dimoun ki ena bon kondwit. Li pou bann malfeter ek bann rebel, bann move dimoun ek bann peser, bann ki pena respe ni pou Bondie ni pou bann zafer sakre; pou bann ki touy zot papa zot mama, bann asasin,
1.10: bann ki amenn move lavi, bann zom ki gagn relasion ant zot; lalwa finn fer pou bann marsan esklav, bann dimoun ki manter e ki zot parol pena valer, e pou tou bann ki komet aksion ki al kont vre lansegnman.
1.11: Mo tir sa lansegnman la dan grander Bonn Nouvel ki Bondie Beni, finn konfie mwa.
1.12: Mo rann gras Zezi Kris nou Segner, mo lafors, parski li finn fer mwa konfians, li finn swazir mwa kouma so serviter.
1.13: Malgre mo ti pe blasfeme, mo ti enn persekiter e mo ti fer violans, zordi, Bondie finn pardonn mwa. Akoz mo lignorans, mo finn azir san lafwa.
1.14: Nou Segner finn vers lor mwa ankor plis lagras e li finn akord mwa lafwa ek lamour ki dan Zezi Kris.
1.15: Ala enn parol sir ki tou dimoun bizin tande: Zezi Kris finn vinn lor later pou sov bann peser. Parmi bann peser, momem premie;
1.16: me mo finn gagn so pardon parski Zezi, atraver mwa, oule manifeste tou so pasians. Mwa mo enn lexanp pou tou seki krwar dan Li pouki zot gagn lavi eternel.
1.17: Tou loner, tou laglwar pou Bondie pou leternite. Li regne pou touzour, li invizib e li tousel Bondie. Amen.
1.18: Timote, mo garson, kan mo pe fer tou sa bann rekomandasion la, mo mazinn bann profesi ki konsern twa. Pran sa parol la kouma enn gid dan sa gran komba ki to ena pou amene la.
1.19: Gard to lafwa ek to konsians drwat. Ena dimoun pa finn pran mo parol ankonsiderasion e zot lafwa finn fer nofraz.
1.20: Parmi ena Imene ek Alexand; mo finn livre zot dan lame Satan, zot va konpran ki fode pa blasfeme.

2.1: Mo fer enn lapel pouki, avan tou, zot fer lapriyer, zot sipliy Bondie ek zot fer aksiondegras pou tou dimoun,
2.2: pou bann lerwa, tou bann ki ena lotorite, pouki lape ek trankilite regne e ki nou kapav viv dan lapiete ek dan dignite.
2.3: Sa li enn gran zafer e li agreab pou Bondie nou Sover
2.4: ki oule sov tou dimoun pouki zot arive konn laverite.
2.5: Kouma ena enn sel Bondie, ena osi enn sel mediater ant Bondie ek limanite, Zezi Kris limem enn imin
2.6: ki finn met so lavi angaz pou liber tou dimoun. Bondie pe rann so temwagnaz dan ler ki ti fixe.
2.7: Li finn swazir mwa pou proklam so mesaz e li avoy mwa kouma enn apot pou pran sarz ek pou instrir tou bann ki pa Zwif dan lafwa ek laverite; seki mo pe dir li vre.
2.8: Ala kifer, mo pe demande ki dimoun priye partou e touletan, ki zot lev zot lame lao dan lesiel, san fer koler, san lager.
2.9: Lor kestion bann madam dan lasanble, fode ki zot teni korek, abiy zot avek respe ek sinplisite; pa fer bann kwafir konplike, pa orn zot lekor ar bizou, perl, e pa met linz extravagan.
2.10: Kouver zot plito ar bann bonaksion; koumsamem enn fam fer kan li respekte Bondie.
2.11: Kan pe donn lansegnman, madam bizin res trankil dan limilite.
2.12: Mo pa permet enn madam donn lansegnman dan bann sesion, ni dominn zom. Li bizin gard silans.
2.13: Adam ti kre anpremie, apre lerla Ev.
2.14: Pa Adam ki ti rant dan piez Satan, me fam la ki ti finn tom dan piez ek finn dezobeir Bondie,
2.15: me so maternite pou sov li. Selma fodre ki bann madam persevere dan lafwa, lamour ek amenn enn bon lavi ek gard enn bon zizman.

3.1: Mo donn enn parol sir: si kikenn anvi vinn levek pou vey lor lafwa, li pe dezir fer enn travay nob.
3.2: Levek bizin enn dimoun ki san repros, enn mari fidel, enn dimoun sinp, rezonab e respektab, ki ena lespri ouver e fodre li kapav donn lansegnman.
3.3: Fodre pa ki li enn soular, ni kontan lager, ni fer koze vinn long ek kontan larzan. Li bizin enn dimoun trankil ki pena enn lintere personel.
3.4: Li bizin konn diriz so prop fami, bien elve so zanfan ki obeir li avek respe.
3.5: Kimanier enn dimoun pou kapav pran sarz Legliz Bondie si li pa kapav diriz so prop fami?
3.6: Fodre pa osi ki li fek konverti, ki li pa ankor fer so prev. Lorgey kapav mont dan so latet e li fini kouma diab.
3.7: Bizin ki dimoun andeor ena boukou lestim pou li, pouki li pa tom dan laont e anmemtan pa may dan lak diab.
3.8: Mem zafer pou bann diak. Zot bizin respektab ek sinser, pa servi doub langaz, pa soular, ni atase ar larzan.
3.9: Zot bizin gard laverite lafwa dan enn konsians kler.
3.10: Bizin teste zot avan. Si pena nanye pou reprose, lerla zot kapav servi kouma diak.
3.11: Zot fam osi bizin respektab, pa koz zafer dimoun, viv dan sinplisite ek azir kouma enn dimoun ki merit konfians dan tou kiksoz.
3.12: Bann diak bizin fidel ar zot madam e gid bien zot zanfan ek zot fami.
3.13: Seki fer so travay bien pou gagn enn bon repitasion e so lafwa dan Zezi Kris pou solid.
3.14: Mo pe ekrir twa sa let la, e mo espere zwenn twa biento.
3.15: Si zame mo tarde, to kone asterla ki fason to bizin konport twa dan lakaz Bondie, samem Legliz Bondie ki vivan, kouma enn kolonn ek enn sipor ki tini laverite.
3.16: Wi, vremem, mister nou lafwa, li gran. Lekris finn paret kouma enn imin, Lespri Sin finn rann li zis, Bann anz finn kontanple li, Finn anons li kot tou bann pep lemonn krwar dan li E li finn mont dan laglwar.

4.1: Lespri Sin dir li klerman: dan dernie tan, ena pou abandonn lafwa. Zot prefer swiv bann lespri ki desevwar e ekout bann lansegnman demoniak.
4.2: Pou ena predikater manter, bann ipokrit ki zot konsians finn nepli sansib komsi finn brile ar feray so.
4.3: Zot pou ansegn ki fode pa marye, e zot defann manz sertenn nouritir. Pourtan Bondie finn kre sa bann nouritir la afin ki bann krwayan ki konn laverite kapav rann li gras.
4.4: Tou saki Bondie kre, li bon. Nanye pa bizin zete, me akeyir plito avek remersiman.
4.5: Avek parol Bondie ek lapriyer, nouritir vinn sin; samem fer plezir Bondie.
4.6: Si to expoz tou sa bann parol la ar bann frer ek ser, to pou vinn enn bon serviter Zezi Kris. Zot pou trouve ki to pe nouri twa avek parol lafwa e ki to pe swiv bon lansegnman avek serye.
4.7: Les dekote bann zistwar payin, bann palab e tou sort komeraz. Abitie twa viv dan latasman avek Bondie.
4.8: Li pa sitan itil ki to okip to lekor, me li pli bon ki to met to latet pou swiv Bondie parski li promet twa lavi zordi ek pou leternite.
4.9: Sa enn parol sir ki tou dimoun bizin aksepte dan fon zot leker.
4.10: Kan nou lite, kan nou debat nou montre ki nou lesperans baze dan Bondie vivan ki Sover tou dimoun, Sover bann ki ena lafwa.
4.11: Lor sa bann zafer lamem ki to bizin insiste ek ansegne.
4.12: Mo napa oule ki personn souzestim twa akoz to enn zenes. Okontrer, vinn enn lexanp pou zot par to parol, to lamour, to lafwa, to manier viv.
4.13: Ziska ki mo vini, konsakre to letan pou etidie Lekritir, fer bann predikasion ek donn lansegnman.
4.14: Pa negliz don lagras ki to finn resevwar kan bann profet ti pronons parol dan to faver e group bann ansien ti inpoz lame lor twa.
4.15: Pran tousala aker, donn twa afon dan to travay, persevere. Lerla, tou dimoun pou trouv to progre.
4.16: Vey lor twa ek lansegnman ki to done. Persevere. Koumsamem to pou sov tomem anmemtan ki to sov bann ki ekout twa.

5.1: Pa fer brit ar enn vie dimoun, me koz ar li kouma to koz ar to papa.
5.2: Tret bann ti zenes kouma to frer, bann vie madam kouma to mama, bann zennfi kouma to ser, avek respe.
5.3: Pran swin bann vev, sirtou seki retrouv zot dan labandon.
5.4: Si enn vev ena zanfan ou tizanfan, zot bizin montre li kouma met anpratik zot lafwa anver zot fami e rann zot paran ou gran paran seki zot dwa. Vremem, sa pou fer plezir Bondie.
5.5: Bann vre vev, bann seki tousel, bizin met zot lesperans zis dan Bondie tousel ek priye, lanwit-lizour, priye e demann Bondie ed zot.
5.6: Me seki nek pans zis lamizman li deza enn kadav ki pe viv.
5.7: Tousala, to bizin dir afin ki zot san repros.
5.8: Si kikenn pa pran swin so fami, li finn fini renie so lafwa, e sa li pir ki enn dimoun ki pa krwar.
5.9: Pou ki enn vev inskrir li lor lalis ofisyel, fodre ki li ena plis ki swasant-an e ki li finn marye enn sel fwa.
5.10: To bizin gete si li ena bon repitasion, si li finn bien elve so bann zanfan, si li finn konn akey dimoun, si li finn met limem oservis bann frer ek ser ki vini, si li finn aport sekour bann malere, si li finn fer dibien ek bann bonaksion.
5.11: Parkont, pa met bann zenn vev lor lalis.
5.12: Kan zot pa kapav tini ek ki zot le remarye, zot met Zezi Kris dekote e zot kas zot premie lalians.
5.13: Anplis zot pena nanye afer, zot nek marse, al dan tou lakaz, fer palab, koz ninport.
5.14: Preferab zot remarye, gagn zanfan e okip zot lakaz pouki bann adverser pa koz nou koze.
5.15: Deza lamem, ena ki finn pran move sime e pe swiv Satan.
5.16: Si enn madam krwayan ena vev dan so fami, li bizin pran li ansarz e pa fie lor legliz parski legliz bizin okip bann vev ki tousel.
5.17: Bann ansien ki diriz bien legliz merit enn doub saler, sirtou bann ki bizin travay dir pou prese ek ansegne.
5.18: Lekritir dir, “Pa met enn mizelier avek enn bef ki pe kraz dible,” e “Enn zouvrie merit so saler.”
5.19: Napa les fer akizasion kont enn ansien si pena de ou trwa temwin.
5.20: Si kikenn fer pese, repran li anpiblik koumsa lezot pou fer atansion.
5.21: Mo sipliy twa, anprezans Bondie e Zezi Kris, devan tou bann anz beni, obzerv sa bann regleman la dan enn fason strik, san fer faver personn.
5.22: Pa inpoz lame vit-vit lor personn, sinon to pou konplis pese lezot. Pran to distans, gard twa prop.
5.23: Aret bwar zis dilo, pran inpe divin pou to lestoma, sa pou evit twa gagn febles.
5.24: Ena dimoun zot pese deor letan get zot; ena lekontrer, aprekou ki dekouver zot pese.
5.25: Mem zafer pou bann bonaksion, pou trouv zot klerman; mem seki pa tro vizib difisil pou kasiet.

6.1: Bann esklav bizin ena respe pou zot met, pouki nom Bondie ek so lansegnman pa blasfeme.
6.2: Bann esklav fode pa mank respe zot met krwayan sou pretex ki bann met frer ar zot. Okontrer zot bizin fer plis parski zot devouman pou profit bann krwayan ek bann frer e ser. Ala seki to bizin ansegne ek rekomande.
6.3: Si kikenn donn enn lot lansegnman ki diferan ar bonn parol nou Segner Zezi e bann lansegnman dapre nou lafwa,
6.4: li gonfle ar lorgey. Li enn ignoran, li fann zizani, nek kontan diskite. Samem ki koz zalouzi, dispit, kritik, soupson
6.5: e bann koze zame fini ant dimoun tilespri ek dan lerer. Zot panse ki ar larelizion kapav fer profi larzan.
6.6: Laverite seki lafwa dan Bondie enn veritab rises si ou kontant ou avek seki ou ena.
6.7: Nou finn vinn lor later lame vid, nou pou ale lame vid.
6.8: Alor, si nou ena manze pou nouri nou ek linz pou abiye, li ase.
6.9: Me bann ki anvi vinn ris, zot tom dan tantasion. Zot bann move dezir met zot dan latrap, e samem ki amenn dimoun dan perdision.
6.10: Kontan larzan samem rasinn tou lemal. Ena finn telman galoup deryer larzan ki zot finn separe ar lafwa e zot nam zame anpe.
6.11: Me twa ki reprezant Bondie, evit tousala. Rod lazistis, latasman ar Bondie, lafwa, lamour, pasians ek douser.
6.12: Amenn gran konba lafwa, pran posesion lavi eternel pou lekel Bondie finn apel twa parski to finn fer enn zoli konfesion to lafwa anprezans boukou temwin.
6.13: Anprezans Bondie ki finn kre tou kiksoz e Zezi Kris ki finn proklam lafwa devan Pons Pilat, mo rekomann twa
6.14: pou vey lor komannman to finn gagne pouki to san repros kan nou Segner Zezi Kris pou manifeste li.
6.15: Sa pou arive ler ki Bondie finn fixe, limem sel Souverin, lasours tou boner, Lerwa bann lerwa, Segner tou segner,
6.16: li tousel imortel, li res dan enn lalimier kot personn pa kapav aprose. Personn pa finn trouv li, ni pe trouv li. Laglwar, pwisans eternel pou li. Amen.
6.17: Dir bann dimoun ris dan sa lavi la, pa rant dan lorgey e pa met zot lesperans dan bann fos rises. Met zot lesperans plito dan Bondie ki donn nou tou seki nou bizin dan labondans.
6.18: Rekomann zot fer lebien. Zot bizin ris ar bonaksion, fer bann don ek partaze.
6.19: Zot va ramas enn zoli trezor bien solid pou lavenir e zot pou gout vre lavi.
6.20: Timote, mo garson, vey bien lor seki Bondie finn konfie twa, evit bann koze dan vid e bann gran-gran deba, ki zot swadizan apel “konesans.”
6.21: Ena sertin sipoze posed bel-bel konesans me zot finn elwagn zot ar lafwa. Mo souet zot lagras Bondie.
